conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connections with C and B, as we both explicitly agreed to look out for each other and keep each other in the loop to ensure our families are taken care of. I also felt a solid bond with E, who shared my deep focus on family motivation and suggested we act as allies once the game begins. On the other hand, I felt the least connected to A, whose approach to the game seemed more tentative and less focused on a specific partnership compared to the others.

I made informal agreements to watch each other's backs and cooperate with C, B, E, and H, focusing on our shared goal of supporting our families. I feel a high level of trust in C and B because of our mutual commitment to stay solid and scout the room together. I am more cautious of G, who explicitly mentioned staying guarded and cautious until the game actually starts.
